note: Operator-labeled ground truth for the deterministic video gates. Seeded from the video-aliveness audit. calibrate.ts fetches each entry's PUBLIC poster (+ footage.social.mp4 when --footage is passed, since those files are large), runs the relevant gate, and prints gate-verdict vs operator-verdict so thresholds stay re-earnable as verdicts accumulate. Add rows over time; keep notes concrete. Dimensions: arc (needs footage), diversity (poster-pair, offline), structure (shader-family taste, offline — the classified dominant family of a finding's shader body). ARC PRESENCE READ (2026-07-04): the arc gate now passes on the WHOLE-frame mean (wholeClipChange >= ARC_FLOOR 0.29) OR a coherent SUBREGION reorganizing strongly (bestWindowChange >= ARC_REGION_FLOOR 0.5), mirroring the flash gate's sliding 10-degree window — so a subject that reveals/crosses in PART of the frame (a distant ship over a dark sky, a ruin resolving in one fog band, a set-video chapter that floods in one region) is not read as dead by a small whole-frame mean. The regional floor is PROVISIONAL, calibrated so a frozen frame fails BOTH reads (its edges are frozen in every window) and a concentrated reveal clears the higher regional bar; re-earn wholeClipChange vs bestWindowChange against the first real presence render. calibrate prints both numbers on arc + judge rows.

entries.notes: a real arc — the structural evolution across the clip the arc gate must PASS (wholeClipChange ~0.356)
20s of near-static bars, cool palette — the dead clip the arc gate must FAIL (wholeClipChange ~0.220)

uniform wallpaper, cool palette — an AESTHETIC/monotony rejection, NOT structural deadness: the arc gate correctly reads it evolving (~0.511). Kept here as a documented coverage boundary — this failure mode belongs to the LLM judge (or a future texture-variety/palette metric), not the deterministic arc floor. calibrate prints its arc score for transparency but does not score it.
the same primitive as 025.5.5T recolored — a diversity repaint; the immediate-neighbour distance must read TOO SIMILAR
the other half of the repaint pair

CHAPTER/SUBREGION coverage boundary (Unit O, the set-video hour render). Provenance: the 019.F.1A pilot rendered 012.2.4L as a 148s set chapter (caustic web) — the sec-driven `rise` ramp rescaled to span the chapter (no 20s freeze), the tail settle suppressed. Rendered stills at 12s/62s/136s are visibly alive (sparse -> flooded -> distinct), yet the deterministic structural-arc WHOLE-frame gate reads wholeClipChange ~0.231 at chapter length, BELOW the 20s floor of 0.29. This is a false-fail by construction: the arc floor is calibrated for a 20s per-track JOURNEY (depart->arrive structural reorganization), but a minutes-long chapter is a STEADY-STATE slice of one vehicle that floods/churns (brightness + density) without a whole-frame reorganization. The 2026-07-04 best-window read is the structural half of the fix: when the flood/churn concentrates in a SUBREGION, bestWindowChange can clear ARC_REGION_FLOOR and the gate no longer reads the chapter dead on the whole-frame mean alone. Where the change is genuinely whole-frame-uniform-but-subtle the arc gate stays ADVISORY at chapter length (render-set treats it so); chapter aliveness is judged off the StudioEnvelope + a visual review, and the strobe/flash gate stays HARD. calibrate fetches 012.2.4L's public 20s footage for transparency and prints wholeClipChange + bestWindowChange, but does not score this row (like 027.2.8R).

STRUCTURAL-AXIS failure exemplar, dated 2026-07-04. The vehicle name reads 'crystal scaffold' but the shader body is a voronoi/cellular field. First of the cellular 3-in-6: three findings inside six shipped the SAME structural primitive (027.5.4D / 027.2.8R / 033.0.1O) under three different poetic names, so a name-only diversity check let them through. cellular is the operator's LEAST-FAVORITE family and is currently SATURATED — this trio is why the structural gate exists. Not an outright ban: pick a family the recent window lacks first.

STRUCTURAL-AXIS failure exemplar, dated 2026-07-04. Second of the cellular 3-in-6 (027.5.4D / 027.2.8R / 033.0.1O). Same voronoi/cellular primitive as its siblings under a distinct vehicle name; already flagged on the 'judge' dimension for aesthetic monotony, and now on 'structure' as part of the over-shipped cellular window. cellular = operator's least-favorite, currently saturated.

STRUCTURAL-AXIS failure exemplar, dated 2026-07-04. Third of the cellular 3-in-6 (027.5.4D / 027.2.8R / 033.0.1O) — the one that pushed three cellular fields inside six findings. This is the concrete case the structural gate now catches: same dominant family within the last 4 shipped => FAIL. cellular = operator's least-favorite, currently saturated; the fix is to author a family the recent window lacks, then name the world freely.
